notes: B200 cooling badge fix — owner correction 2026-07-04, pulled forward from Icon Batch 2 §2 by John's explicit 'b200 fix now' (STACKED on the not-yet-device-verified .181/.182 by owner instruction — one device pass now covers .181–.183). Then ?legacy=1: identical everywhere. ROLLBACK: revert the commit. Gates: 4 script blocks compile, CSS braces 3560 balanced, CRLF preserved, 3-stamp lockstep.
